title: OpenVIP Message
description: Open Voice Interaction Protocol v1.0 message schema. Covers message payloads only (transcription, speech). Control, Response, Error, and Status payloads are defined in binding specifications (e.g., OpenAPI).

partial.description: If true, this is an incomplete transcription in progress

trace_id.description: ID of the original message that started this chain. Present only on derived messages (2nd message onwards in a trace).

parent_id.description: ID of the message this one was derived from. Present only on derived messages (2nd message onwards in a trace).

x_input.description: Standard extension: text input behavior. ops is an ordered list of input operations to perform.

ops.description: Ordered list of input operations to perform

trigger.description: The voice phrase that triggered this action

source.description: Generator identifier — free-form string identifying the component that produced this extension

x_agent_switch.description: Standard extension: agent routing. Requests switching the active agent in multi-agent environments.

target.description: Identifier of the agent to switch to

source.description: Generator identifier — free-form string identifying the component that produced this extension

^x_.description: Extension field. Value must be a structured JSON object.
